page.title: Messages
page.selectConversation: Select a conversation to review the thread.
page.handoffActiveDescription: A human reply will switch this conversation into handoff mode.
page.handoffPausedDescription: AI will stay silent until an operator resumes it.
page.handoffPausedStatus: The AI was paused for this user on {{time}}.
page.handoffPausedStatusWithoutTime: The AI was paused for this user.
page.handoffPausedStatusFallback: The AI is paused for this conversation.

outcome.label: Summary
outcome.scheduling: Customer started scheduling, but no appointment was confirmed yet.
outcome.schedulingWithService: Customer is scheduling {{serviceName}}, but no appointment was confirmed yet.
outcome.schedulingWithServiceAndTime: Customer is scheduling {{serviceName}} for {{startsAt}}, but the booking is still in progress.
outcome.messageTaking: Customer left a message for follow-up.
outcome.none: Customer asked questions, but no final booking outcome was captured yet.
